message:
fix(db,tui): recognize BusySnapshot as MVCC conflict and add positional column / stats fallbacks

Extend MVCC conflict detection to recognize frankensqlite's BusySnapshot
error ("snapshot conflict on pages", "busy_snapshot") in both the
is_mvcc_conflict() predicate and the transaction-level is_mvcc_error()
check. The latter now matches DbError::ResourceBusy in addition to
DbError::Sqlite, ensuring BusySnapshot triggers whole-transaction retry
instead of surfacing as an unrecoverable error.

Add positional column index fallbacks in parse_project_summary_rows()
for queries that alias column names differently than expected, preventing
empty project lists when column names don't match. Add
parse_raw_ts_with_index() helper for timestamp parsing with index
fallback.

Dashboard summary band now falls back to live db_stats_snapshot() when
the periodic stat tick hasn't fired yet (timestamp_micros == 0),
showing real counts instead of zeros on initial render.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
